BatchDeleteElasticNetworkCardIntranetIp.eniId: The ID of the elastic network interface
BatchDeleteElasticNetworkCardIntranetIp.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
BatchDeleteElasticNetworkCardIntranetIp.privateIpAddresses: Specified private IP address information. Supports IPv4 or IPv6 addresses, with a maximum of 10 addresses per request
